description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc syntax checks that runs on pushes to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow performs syntax checks for various GCC and C++ standard combinations, including C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, and C++20, with and without STL, on ubuntu-22.04. For each job, it checks out the repository, sets up the environment, runs cmake with specific flags, checks the GCC version, and builds with make.
